title: Opening for Category Manager at Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Opening for Category Manager at Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Category Manager for our Noida operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd!
